name: Bar-bq Ranch Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, warm the oil over medium heat.
2. Add the onions, chiles, and garlic, and sauté over medium heat until everything is softened.
3. Mix in the remaining ingredients.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 35 to 40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Cover and allow the sauce to cool briefly.
6. Strain the sauce through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
7. Puree the solids (onions, chiles, garlic) in a food processor or blender until smooth.
8. Return the pureed mixture to the sauce and stir thoroughly.
9. Transfer the sauce to a container and refrigerate overnight to allow flavors to meld and mellow.
10. Use the sauce warm or chilled. It will keep for weeks.
Variation: If you prefer a thinner sauce, dilute with water until reaching your desired consistency. The sauce will still be flavorful.
